preamble: Palatal glides often undergo strengthening to become voiced affricates, especially in word-initial positions.

examples.note: Yod-strengthening in dialects leading to affrication.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
